name: Specter Sam
message: I noticed you left your locker open again. It is quite difficult to haunt a hallway when people are so careless with their bronze padlocks. Please be more mindful of the living.

name: Headless Heather
message: I seem to have lost my head in the chemistry lab during the midnight pep rally. If you find it, please drop it off at the lost and found. It is the one with the glowing green eyes.

name: Phantom Phil
message: The cafeteria meatloaf is actually moving on its own today. I suggest sticking to the 'ectoplasm-free' salad bar if you value your afterlife.

name: Banshee Bella
message: My screaming practice was interrupted by your loud breathing. Some of us are trying to maintain a certain level of dread around here. Keep it down.
signature: Chief Wailer of the West Wing

name: Shadow Silas
message: I will be watching from the corner of the ceiling during your math final. Don't worry, I won't help you with the answers. I failed geometry in 1924 and I am not starting over now.
